name: Chicken Corn Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Cover the chicken with 3 quarts of water and bring to a boil. Skim off any foam.
2. Reduce heat to low, add salt and saffron, and steep until the chicken is tender.
3. Remove the chicken and strain the stock into a clean pot.
4. Return the chicken meat to the stock along with the corn.
5. Add the noodles and bring back to a boil.
6. Cook for 15 minutes or until the noodles are tender.
7. Stir in parsley, eggs, and pepper. Serve.
